import React from'react';import{Line}from'react-chartjs-2';import{Chart as ChartJS,CategoryScale,LinearScale,PointElement,LineElement,Title,Tooltip,Legend}from'chart.js';// Register ChartJS components
import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";ChartJS.register(CategoryScale,LinearScale,PointElement,LineElement,Title,Tooltip,Legend);const AssetChart=_ref=>{let{asset}=_ref;// Extract price history data from the asset
const priceHistory=asset.priceHistory||[];// Get last 10 data points or less if not available
const dataPoints=priceHistory.slice(-10);// Format dates for x-axis labels
const labels=dataPoints.map(point=>{const date=new Date(point.timestamp);return date.toLocaleTimeString([],{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'});});// Get price data
const prices=dataPoints.map(point=>point.price);// Chart data
const data={labels,datasets:[{label:"".concat(asset.name," Price"),data:prices,borderColor:'rgb(52, 152, 219)',backgroundColor:'rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.2)',tension:0.2}]};// Chart options
const options={responsive:true,plugins:{legend:{position:'top'},tooltip:{callbacks:{label:context=>"$".concat(context.raw.toFixed(2))}}},scales:{y:{beginAtZero:false,ticks:{callback:value=>"$".concat(value)}}}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"asset-chart",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Line,{data:data,options:options})});};export default AssetChart;
